eventRemoved: The event was removed from the agenda
eventRemoveTitle: Remove an event from the agenda
eventRemoveDetails: Are you sure you want to do this? If you remove the event from this agenda, it will no longer be listed in the exports and will be removed from any agenda aggregating your events
eventDeleteDetails: Are you sure you want to do this? If you delete the event from this agenda, it will be permanently removed from all agendas on OpenAgenda.
